messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-555 — Root capability commands Slice 1 — `doctor` and `status` as engine-level commands usable with or without a running swarm
Approval context: Held pending BL-554's ruling (reading (a) vs (b) — see that epic's
approval_context). Drafted here ONLY against reading (a): standalone means
"no persistent multi-role pipeline required," tmux/swarmforge machinery
stays the substrate. No acceptance feature file yet — this ticket stays
needs_design/…
BL-555 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-555" (or "reject BL-555 <reason>") to act.
